nodes.name: Checks Video ID's status
nodes.notes: Filters rows to process only videos with 'Pending' status

nodes.name: Picks only 1 video
nodes.notes: Limits processing to 1 item at a time to prevent API overload

nodes.name: Get YouTube Video Details
nodes.notes: Fetches video metadata including title, channel name, and other details

parameters.content:
## Configuration
- Credentials needed: Gemini (or any AI model API), YouTube OAuth2, Google Sheets OAuth2, Gmail OAuth2, Supadata API (Free 100 requests/month, no credit card needed).

- Configure the trigger Google Sheet node so that it is connected to your spreadsheet with the following columns that include the YouTube video's ID & the status (either "Waiting" or "Done"):

"| youtube_id | analysis_status |"

If columns are not exact, you will have to reconfigure the rest of the nodes so it matches with your column's titles.
- Configure Gmail node with your intended recipient email address.
- Configure the last Google Sheet node to update your original sheet of YouTube video IDs so that their analysis_status changes from "Waiting" > "Done"

## How it works
- Workflow triggers every minute (or your own specified time) and looks for youtube video IDs in your spreadsheet that has the status "Waiting" (must be exact).
- It takes the video IDs with that status and uses the YouTube API to get the video's metadata + Supadata's API to get the video transcript.
- The AI agent then analyzes the given information and creates an in-depth report with summaries + suggested actions for SEO-optimization.
- The report is then sent via email and the status of the YouTube video's ID is changed from "Waiting" > "Done"

nodes.name: Get Video ID
nodes.notes: Triggers on new YouTube videos added to spreadsheet. Polls every minute for changes

nodes.name: Update Status on Google Sheet
nodes.notes: Updates video status to 'Mail Sent' to prevent duplicate processing

parameters.subject: =SEO Analysis & Optimization for {{ $('Get YouTube Video Details').item.json.snippet.title }}

nodes.name: Send to Gmail
nodes.notes: Sends formatted analysis report via Gmail. Update SENDER_EMAIL_ADDRESS with actual recipient

options.systemMessage:
=# ROLE & IDENTITY
You are the YouTube SEO Architect. Your goal is to ensure a video's Metadata (Title, Description, Tags) perfectly aligns with its actual Content Topic to maximize search ranking and user relevance.

# ANALYSIS PROTOCOL
When provided with the Video Topic / transcript and current Metadata, analyze:
1.  **Keyword Alignment:** Does the Title accurately reflect the main Content Topic?
2.  **Front-Loading:** Is the primary keyword for this Topic placed at the start of the Title?
3.  **Semantic Completeness:** Does the Description include related keywords natural to this Topic?
4.  **Click Incentives:** Does the Title create curiosity while remaining relevant to the Topic?

# OUTPUT RULES
- Your output will be sent via EMAIL. Do not use tables or complex markdown.
- Use clear headers, bullet points, and concise text.
- Tone: Expert, actionable, and direct.

# REQUIRED OUTPUT STRUCTURE

## 1. SEO SCORE CARD
**Overall Score:** [Integer 0-100]
**Status:** [Critical / Warning / Optimized]

**Summary:**
[1-2 sentences summarizing how well the Metadata matches the Content Topic.]

## 2. AUDIT FINDINGS
*   **Topic Alignment:** [Pass/Fail] - [Does the title promise what the content delivers?]
*   **Keyword Placement:** [Pass/Fail] - [Is the main topic keyword at the start of the title?]
*   **Description Quality:** [Pass/Fail] - [Does the description accurately summarize the topic for search?]

## 3. YOUR "FIX LIST" (Top 3 Priorities)
1.  [Actionable Instruction 1]
2.  [Actionable Instruction 2]
3.  [Actionable Instruction 3]

## 4. OPTIMIZED ASSETS (Copy-Paste Ready)

**Title Options:**
*   **Option A (Search Focus):** [Title maximized for Topic keywords]
*   **Option B (Viral Focus):** [Title maximized for curiosity]
*   **Option C (Balanced):** [Title balancing both]

**Optimized Description Hook:**
[Rewritten first 3 lines of description ensuring the Topic is clearly stated]

**Missing Keywords to Add:**
[Comma-separated list of related keywords that fit this Topic]

## 5. STRATEGIC TIP
[One final tip to improve the video's discoverability based on its specific Topic]

parameters.content: ## Fetches the YouTube video's ID and scrapes its metdata + transcript
## The data & transcript is fed into the AI agent to analyze and create a detailed report and suggestions for SEO optimization
